hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); printf "%s" "$cmd" | grep -q "git mv" || exit 0; out=$(printf "git mv: verify moved files show R (rename), not D+add:\n"; git status --short -uno; echo "--- staged renames (diff --cached -M --diff-filter=R) ---"; git diff --cached -M --diff-filter=R --name-status); jq -n --arg c "$out" '{hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:"PostToolUse",additionalContext:$c}}'
